title: Sealed Packet IV — Packet fourth under wafer
subtitle: Trust this sheet if thou wilt; the sergeant trusted it not, yet kept it.

sections.heading: INNER ABSTRACT
sections.body:
A deep background check on the base technician reveals his full legal birth registry is Olafsson-Vance. He is the direct biological great-grandson of Thomas Vance—the man Lt. Norquist's ancestor callously left to perish on the polar ice in 1912. Olafsson uncovered the historical diary fragment months ago, realizing he could execute a dual strike: silence Halla to protect his data fraud and thoroughly ruin Norquist by weaponizing the perfect ancestral motive.

Marked reliable by the clerk who was himself twice found mistaken.

Thus was it lodged in the file, though not one man at the desk would swear to the whole of it. The reader may think this intimate; the desk did not. They filed it beside blood, salt, and the ordinary treacheries of mankind.

sections.heading: RESTRICTED OBSERVATION
sections.body:
A recovered raw storage block from the CCTV backup mainframe reveals that the video sequence of Director Norquist exiting with the canvas bag was captured at 20:15 during an earlier routine gear relocation. This clip was digitally injected and timestamped into the 22:04 sequence. The unaltered raw block shows a different figure clad in maintenance overalls breaching the cabin via the rear utility hatch at 22:15.

Filed in a fair hand; trust it not overmuch.

The phrasing is too neat by half, which in murder-books is seldom a happy omen. The reader may think this intimate; the desk did not. They filed it beside blood, salt, and the ordinary treacheries of mankind.

Pencilled upon the inward flap, as though it were but a warehouse remembrance: The fifth sealed gate opens to the exact minute the shadow slipped through the cabin's maintenance hatch, unseen by the altered CCTV index.
